headline: FedEx (FDX) Is Up 5.1% After Launching AI-Powered SameDay Local Service Nationwide – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In March 2026, FedEx announced FedEx SameDay Local, a last-mile service offering two-hour and end-of-day delivery windows nationwide, built with OneRail’s network and AI-driven orchestration for near real-time tracking and predictive ETAs. This move aims to help retailers cut abandoned carts and improve customer loyalty by matching shoppers’ growing preference for same-day, time-definite delivery options. We’ll now explore how the launch of FedEx SameDay Local, with its AI-powered last-mile...
